# lcov_exclude.txt - exclusion patterns for coverage filtering
# Referenced by coverage.ps1 and GitHub Actions
# Lines starting with # are comments; blank lines are ignored
#
# Pattern matching: PowerShell -like operator
#   * matches zero or more of any character (including path separators)
#   Paths in lcov.info are relative, using forward slashes (e.g. lib/features/auth/auth_api.dart)

# Entry points / routing (no logic)
lib/main.dart
lib/app_router.dart

# Generated files (json_serializable, Retrofit, Mockito)
lib/l10n/*
*/*.g.dart
*/*.mocks.dart

# Config / constants only
lib/core/config/*
lib/core/storage/*
lib/core/theme/*
lib/core/di/*
lib/core/models/*

# Network infrastructure (framework config / interceptors)
lib/core/network/dio_client.dart
lib/core/network/app_exception.dart
lib/core/network/auth_interceptor.dart

# DI wiring for all features (no business logic)
lib/features/*_providers.dart

# Data models: fromJson/toJson delegation to generated code only
lib/features/*/data/models/*.dart

# Presentation-layer VO models: pure data classes, no logic
lib/features/*/presentation/models/*.dart

# UI widgets (navigation shell)
lib/features/shell/*
